rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at its established high baseline; no headline this cycle introduces a qualitative change in Western aid, military escalation, or infrastructure attacks relevant to Ukrainian residents. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian grief — no operational or policy impact on Ukrainian residents' daily lives or safety.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump rhetoric on Iran deal continues; no confirmed shift in US policy toward Ukraine or Western military aid — continuation of background uncertainty.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
top_events.summary: Israeli territorial expansion in the Middle East draws US attention away from Ukraine, sustaining background concern about Western focus — but no confirmed aid reduction.
